faq.whatIsPartnersProgram: What is the Aipify Partners program?
faq.howBecomePartner: How do I become an Aipify Partner?
faq.marketingMaterials: Where can I access partner marketing materials?
faq.howCertifications: How do I complete partner certifications?
faq.contactPartnership: How do I contact Aipify regarding partnership questions?
faq.monitorPerformance: How can I monitor my partner performance?
faq.viewCustomers: How do I view customers associated with my partner account?
faq.customerUpgrades: What happens if a customer upgrades their subscription?

faqAnswers.what-is-partners-program: Aipify Partners is the dedicated workspace for individuals and businesses that partner with Aipify to promote and sell Aipify products. Partners operate independently while collaborating through approved partner programs.
faqAnswers.how-become-partner: Apply through the Partner Program onboarding flow. Complete Partner Academy requirements and receive approval before accessing the full Partners workspace.
faqAnswers.how-commissions-work: Commissions are tracked through referral attribution and revenue attribution modules. Payout schedules and rates depend on your partner tier and program terms.
faqAnswers.how-referrals-tracked: Referral links and lead assignments connect prospects to your partner account. Referral Performance shows active, converted, and invited referrals.
faqAnswers.marketing-materials: Open Marketing → Marketing Assets, Campaign Templates, Email Templates, and Product Catalog in the Partners portal.
faqAnswers.how-certifications: Complete training programs and certifications under Academy. Certification progress appears on your Partners Dashboard.
faqAnswers.contact-partnership: Use Support channels listed in your partner onboarding materials or contact Aipify through your assigned Partner Manager.
faqAnswers.monitor-performance: Your Partners Dashboard, Performance Summary, Rankings, and Performance Metrics modules show leads, conversions, referrals, and certification progress.
faqAnswers.view-customers: Open Customers → Leads, Pipeline, and Prospects to view customers and prospects associated with your partner account.
faqAnswers.customer-upgrades: When a referred customer upgrades, attribution and commission rules follow your partner program terms. Revenue Attribution reflects updated subscription tiers.

economyEngine.title: Settlement Portal
economyEngine.subtitle: Review sales, commissions, and settlements — approve self-billing invoices and get paid through your registered business.
economyEngine.principle: Growth Partners are independent businesses — Aipify Group AS sells software; partners earn one-time commissions on initial sales only.
economyEngine.oneTimeNote: No recurring, residual, or lifetime commissions. Commissions apply to first-time purchases only.
economyEngine.noCompanyBody: To become an Aipify Growth Partner, you must operate through a registered business entity.
economyEngine.norwayGuidance: In Norway, you may register an ENK through Brønnøysundregistrene.
economyEngine.accessDenied: Settlement portal access requires an active Growth Partner account.

tier.ladderNote: Commission ladder — initial sales only (subject to adjustment by Aipify Group AS):

settlement.approvalStatement: I confirm that the settlement information is accurate and authorize Aipify Group AS to issue an invoice on behalf of my business.

faq.title: Growth Partner Economy FAQ
faq.notEmployee: Are Growth Partners employees of Aipify?
faq.notEmployeeAnswer: No. Growth Partners are independent businesses and suppliers — not employees. No payroll, holiday pay, or employer contributions apply.
faq.recurringAnswer: No. Commissions apply only to first-time purchases. No residual or lifetime commissions.
faq.selfBillingAnswer: After you approve a settlement, Aipify Group AS generates a legally compliant invoice on behalf of your business, then processes payment as a supplier expense.

workforceScheduling.title: Partner arbejdskraftplanlægning
workforceScheduling.subtitle: Coordinate partner shift coverage and on-call obligations while preserving customer ownership and commission attribution.
workforceScheduling.principle: Partner scheduling preserves platform customer ownership — attribution and commission remain intact.
workforceScheduling.privacyNote: Partner operational scheduling metadata only — no customer business content.
workforceScheduling.emptyState: Partner scheduling is not available for your profile yet.
workforceScheduling.attributionNote: Lead coverage preserves Growth Partner attribution and commission — customers remain platform-owned.
workforceScheduling.noRecords: No partner scheduling records in this section yet.

teamTime.title: Teamtid
teamTime.subtitle: Partnerteam tid og orlov.
teamTime.principle: Partner team time is separate from customer, lead, referral, and commission attribution.
teamTime.empty: Team Time is not available for this partner profile.
teamTime.attributionPreserved: Customer, lead, referral, and commission attribution preserved.

businessContinuity.title: Forretningskontinuitet
businessContinuity.subtitle: Partnerporteføljekontinuitet — kundeejerskab forbliver hos Platform; henvisning og provisionsbeskyttelse bevares.
businessContinuity.principle: Growth Partners opretholder porteføljekontinuitet — Aipify beskytter attribuering og provision uden at overføre kundeejerskab.
businessContinuity.privacyNote: Partnerkontinuitet viser kun porteføljemetadata. Ingen adgang til kunders interne systemer eller tværgående partnerdata.
businessContinuity.customerOwnershipNote: Kunder tilhører Platform. Partnere modtager attribuering og provisionsbeskyttelse — aldrig kundeejerskab.
businessContinuity.empty: Forretningskontinuitet er ikke tilgængelig for denne partnerprofil.
